calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-05-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Quintilliani appeared via zoom for Jacob Nist (petitioner).

The court acknowledged the declaration that was filed, and That's sufficient efforts have been made.

Petition for letters of administration is taken under submission with the intent to grant.
Temporary restraining order is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Obitinalla. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Hearing On Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Feb-03-2026 Off Calendar
EX PARTE PETITION FOR ORDER TO STAY THE FORECLOSURE SALE OF ESTATE REAL PROPERTY

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Continued To Feb-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Continued To Jan-06-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Quintiliani for petitioner Jacob Nist (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Letters of Administration.

The Court directed counsel to file a declaration of due diligence regarding their search for heirs. Counsel agreed to provide a declaration.

Counsel informed the Court that special letters were previously issued to enable payment to an heir search company, but there was confusion regarding the deadlines for obtaining the final results. The final search results have not yet been received, and payment has not been completed.

Counsel requested an extension of the special letters of administration, which are set to expire on November 20, 2025. The Court agreed to extend the special letters through the next hearing date, counsel was directed to submit a proposed order to the Probate Examiner.

The Court continued the matter to January 6, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Quintiliani for petitioner Jacob Nist (via Zoom).

The matter came on for hearing on the petition for letters of administration.

Mr. Quintiliani requested that the order appointing special administrator he had previously lodged with the Court be signed that letters could be issued in order to assist in the completion of an heir search.

The Court signed the order appointing Jacob Nist as special administrator with limited authority to use estate assets for purposes of conducting the heir search.

The matter was continued to November 18, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 for hearing on the petition for appointment of a general administrator.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2025 Continued To Aug-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Quintiliani appeared via zoom for Jacob Nist (Petitioner).

Counsel stated that he attempted to contact family members and heirs, that his client would need additional funds from the estate to retain an heir finder.

On the Courts own motion, a temporary special administrator will be appointed.

The matter is continued to August 20, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
